description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden frame with two prominent side rails and a flat, solid load platform. The cart is supported by two large, octagonal wheels mounted at the rear, providing stability and ease of movement. At the front, two extended wooden handles allow for manual pushing or pulling. The interior of the cart contains three small, upright blue objects, possibly representing bottles or containers. The overall construction appears robust, with the wood finished in a warm brown color and the wheels integrated into the frame. The design is utilitarian, suitable for transporting goods or supplies in an urban environment.
description: A sturdy brown wooden handcart with side rails, rear-mounted octagonal wheels, and a flat load platform containing three blue objects.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the cart, the two parallel handles, and the side rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long handles, the full length of the side rails, and one large octagonal wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat load platform with three blue objects and the open back between the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other wheel, side rails, and the handles extending forward.
